keys.description: In-memory registry of the canonical token vocabulary loaded at boot from data/token-vocabulary.json.
Resolved final token map for one (tenant, mode). Hot path — every TokenResolver::resolveTokens() read hits this first.
invalidatedBy: ThemeTokenOverridden for a row on this tenant's active theme in the mode

keys.description: Signed URL to the compiled CSS artifact in storage for one (tenant, mode). Served to the frontend via GET /themes/current.
The seeded platform presets list (tenant_id NULL). Same content for every tenant. Cached because the preset picker in the admin UI reads this on every open.
The tenant's custom presets list (tenant_id != NULL).
invalidatedBy: PATCH or DELETE on a preset owned by this tenant

keys.description: The user's per-user preference row (mode + accessibility_overrides). Short TTL because users toggle preferences interactively.
Signed URL for the preset's preview thumbnail. Long TTL — presets don't move often.
invalidatedBy: PreviewPresetJob writes a fresh URL to ThemePreset.preview_thumbnail_url
